column1: They (to find) themselves on the shore of a large lake an hour ago.
Next summer I ______ get up at 7 every Sunday.
Tom (to return) from the cinema by five o’clock.
They said to him, “What time does the train leave?” - They asked him what time the train_________ .
If you have a passion, you will be definitely _______ in life.
He __________ meet me at the train station.
I bought a new car ... is very fast.
He (to write) books since he was a young man.
When does your mother leave ... home for work?
If I (to tell) her how beautiful she is, she (be) pleased.
This bone (to give) to my dog tomorrow.
